name: folder-base-view
description: Open a folder in the file explorer to view its contents as a Bases-powered table of contents, with no companion note required.

scripts.version: npm run build && node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.postversion: git push origin main --follow-tags && gh release create $npm_package_version main.js manifest.json --generate-notes

author: KulySocc
